Estimate    Actual  Operator
       1         1  AGGREGATE MIN(title)
       1         5  INNER JOIN LOOP ON movie_id = movie_id AND movie_id = id AND (movie_id = id)
      69       405  │└INNER JOIN LOOP ON id = movie_id
     438     12951  │ │└INNER JOIN LOOP ON keyword_id = id
      13        30  │ │ │└TABLE SCAN keyword AS k WHERE k.keyword LIKE '%sequel%'
    9150     12951  │ │ TABLE SEEK movie_keyword AS mk

     405       405  TABLE SEEK movie_info AS mi WHERE mi.info = 'Bulgaria'
queries.sql:
SELECT MIN(t.title) AS movie_title
FROM job.keyword AS k,
     job.movie_info AS mi,
     job.movie_keyword AS mk,
     job.title AS t
WHERE k.keyword LIKE '%sequel%'
  AND mi.info IN ('Bulgaria')
  AND t.production_year > 2010
  AND t.id = mi.movie_id
  AND t.id = mk.movie_id
  AND mk.movie_id = mi.movie_id
  AND k.id = mk.keyword_id;
